title: explicit load_state() call has no comment; silent double-init risk
description: In testnet_shielded_payment_end_to_end the receive-side block calls bob_scanner.load_state() explicitly before scan_to_tip(). No equivalent call appears for Alice. There is no comment explaining why load_state() must be called separately (rather than being implicit in scan_to_tip). If CompactBlockScanner is later changed to call load_state() internally at the start of scan_to_tip(), the explicit call becomes a double-init with undefined behavior — no error, no warning, silent corruption potential. Add a comment stating what load_state() does and why it must precede scan_to_tip() here.
